source.cookbook: Black Rican Vegan   Fire Plant Based Recipes from
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
COMPRA LIST
Chopped Cheese
1 tbsp (15 ml) grapeseed oil
¼ cup (38 g) diced mixed green and red bell pepper
¼ cup (40 g) diced yellow onion
1 tbsp (15 ml) Sofrito
1 lb (455 g) Beyond Meat ground meat
1 tsp (⅔ [4-g] packet) Sazón or my homemade Sazón
1 tsp Adobo
3 slices vegan Cheddar cheese (I recommend Violife brand)
2 vegan bread rolls of your liking
½ head romaine lettuce, sliced
1 tomato, sliced
Mayo Ketchup
½ cup (115 g) vegan mayonnaise
¼ cup (60 g) ketchup
1 tbsp (15 g) relish
ingredients.original:
COMPRA LIST
Chopped Cheese
1 tbsp (15 ml) grapeseed oil
¼ cup (38 g) diced mixed green and red bell pepper
¼ cup (40 g) diced yellow onion
1 tbsp (15 ml) Sofrito
1 lb (455 g) Beyond Meat ground meat
1 tsp (⅔ [4-g] packet) Sazón or my homemade Sazón
1 tsp Adobo
3 slices vegan Cheddar cheese (I recommend Violife brand)
2 vegan bread rolls of your liking
½ head romaine lettuce, sliced
1 tomato, sliced
Mayo Ketchup
½ cup (115 g) vegan mayonnaise
¼ cup (60 g) ketchup
1 tbsp (15 g) relish

ingredients.item: Pile your meat together and add your vegan cheese. If you want it to melt, add a tablespoon (15 ml) of water to the pan and cover it with a lid for 1 to 2 minutes.
ingredients.original: Pile your meat together and add your vegan cheese. If you want it to melt, add a tablespoon (15 ml) of water to the pan and cover it with a lid for 1 to 2 minutes.
